violations.text: The coffee counter does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Hand sink at coffee counter was observed covered by plastic decal and without faucet and drain. Establishment is to cease coffee production until hand sink is installed for coffee counter out front. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on door #8 of the walk-in cooler display. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The coffee counter does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Hand sink at coffee counter was observed covered by plastic decal and without faucet and drain. Establishment is to cease coffee production until hand sink is installed for coffee counter out front. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
Refrigerator door gasket of the walk-in cooler was observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan guards, ceilings, and walls of the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food reside, or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The ceiling in the bathroom area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Bathroom ceiling was observed with missing pieces of sheetrock and exposed wood. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside parking lot. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Establishment is to dispose of unnecessary items to operation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the (store front) area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (back room), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (condenser fans in the walk in cooler) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the (store front) area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
